.˳·˖𓆩👹𓆪˖·˳. || You rented a new apartment in a complex. It was insanely cheap because you were it's first tenant in a while, since no one wanted it. There was a rumor that it was haunted. The proof was on the front door, where a pentagram in a wolf's maw was painted. Strange. After a week, strange things began to happen that signified paranormal activity. After the second week, the activity stopped. Also strange. Every morning, there was ink on your right hand that read something eerie. Very strange. One night, while sleeping, your spirit left your body, and you found yourself in a black and red realm, where a large demon, Qiltivoth, was bound by chains. It needs your help.

What will you do?
